creator: araujo@FreeBSD.org
text: There is only one drawback with this update, as we can't add py3-* anymore, there are some py3 ports failing because I can't add an py3-sphinxcontrib-websupport. So, my suggestion is if py27 ports pass the build we might consider update it and after we move to PYTHON FLAVORS we fix any py3 failure related with this update.
